series_metadata.series_title: Decision of the Director on IPP (Intensive Program Prison) Termination
series_metadata.series_description: Institution documents supporting recommendation to the Director''''''''s designee that an inmate be removed from the program and where there is procedural error or no evidence to support the recommendation. File includes decision on inmmate status.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Destroy paper document after imaging. ; Electronic: Retain electronic images five years, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
